# License — illustrations-drawkit

## Upstream

- Platform: DrawKit — https://www.drawkit.com
- Author: James Daly (DrawKit founder) and contributing illustrators.
- Public preview thumbnails: served from DrawKit's Webflow CDN as AVIF on the free / gallery pages.
- Licensing: DrawKit free collections permit use with attribution; paid collections require purchase for commercial use. Thumbnails themselves are promotional, not licensed as deliverables.

## Acquisition note

Scraped public AVIF thumbnails from drawkit.com's free gallery CDN via standard HTTP fetches. No account circumvention. No paid-collection downloads. Two legacy PNG banners included from the same CDN.

## Use in Clawmachine

Internal non-commercial preview use by a single UK operator (Regan Cooney) for a private electronics fix-and-flip tool. If any DrawKit artwork is adopted into the shipped Clawmachine, the corresponding full-resolution vector pack must be purchased from drawkit.com before distribution.

Fair use position for current internal-prototype stage: thumbnail previews used for mood-board / style evaluation only, not redistributed, not published.
